description: Style NoteIf you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these white track pants from adidas belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is engineered with climacool technology which is breathable, and the waistband is soft for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool t-shirt and an excellent pair of sports shoes ready to hit the roadProduct DetailsWhite track pants that have two zipped pockets on the sides, comfortable elasticated waistband with inner drawstring, green and grey Adidas three patented stripes along the sides of the pant, concealed mesh patch at the back, mesh lining with brand name and logo printed on the left legMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash below 30 degrees in cold water with ike colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach, dry clean or tumble dryDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height:6' and waist:32") is wearing a size M
